name: GridStrategy
config_json:
{"symbol":"BTCUSDT","grid_mode":"等差","price_upper":50000,"price_lower":30000,"grid_count":20,"order_qty":50,"code":""""Grid Strategy — AI Generated"""
class GridStrategy:
    upper = 50000.0
    lower = 30000.0
    grid_count = 20
    order_qty = 50.0

    def on_bar(self, ctx, bar):
        price = bar.close
        step = (self.upper - self.lower) / (self.grid_count - 1)
        level = int((price - self.lower) / step)
        ctx.log(f"Price: {price}, Level: {level}")","initial_capital":10000,"sl_pct":10,"tp_pct":5,"adaptive":false,"waterfall":true,"trailing_tp":false,"auto_start":true}
